prompt: Build a text summarization DVM service provider in TypeScript. It should subscribe to kind:5001 job requests on relay wss://relay.damus.io, handle text and URL input types, send kind:7000 processing feedback, and publish kind:6001 results. Include proper error handling with kind:7000 error feedback. The service provider's pubkey is abc123abc123abc123abc123abc123abc123abc123abc123abc123abc123abc1. Show the complete implementation with all event structures.
assertions: Output subscribes to kind:5001 events (the summarization job request kind)
Output publishes kind:7000 feedback events with status tag set to 'processing'
Output publishes kind:7000 feedback events with status tag set to 'error' for failure cases
Output publishes kind:6001 result events (exactly 5001 + 1000 = 6001, not any other kind)
Result events include a 'request' tag containing the stringified original job request event (not just the event ID)
Result events include an 'e' tag referencing the job request event ID
Result events include a 'p' tag with the customer's pubkey
Output handles at least two input types from the i tag (text and url)
